name: aegis
description: AEGIS — Autonomous E-commerce & Growth Intelligence System

scripts.dev: docker-compose up -d postgres redis && concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd workers && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../workers && npm run build
scripts.migrate:all: for f in migrations/*.sql; do echo "Running $f..."; psql $DATABASE_URL < $f; done
